name: US Cash Advance
description_short: Bloomington, IN's US Cash Advance at 601 E Hillside Dr offers payday and title loans with extended hours daily.
description_long:
US Cash Advance is located at 601 E Hillside Dr #300 in Bloomington, IN, operating as a standalone storefront conveniently positioned for Bloomington residents and visitors. The location maintains extended hours, Monday through Friday from 8AM to 9PM, and Saturday and Sunday from 10AM to 7PM, making it accessible for both weekday and weekend financial needs.

This Bloomington location specializes in payday loans and title loans, providing quick access to cash when you need it most. The professional staff can guide you through the application process and answer questions about loan terms and conditions. For more information or to discuss your specific financial situation, call the Bloomington branch directly at +1 812-624-6198.

If you're a Bloomington resident facing a short-term financial need, bring a valid government ID, proof of income, and an active bank account to your appointment. US Cash Advance serves the immediate credit needs of the community with straightforward lending options.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding available for approved applicants
Accepts all credit types including bad credit; no credit check loans offered
In-person service with extended hours (8am-9pm weekdays) at Detroit location
No collateral required; unsecured loans for amounts up to $50,000
Fast approval process reported at 45 minutes to a couple of hours
Staff described as patient and transparent about repayment terms in reviews
Online application option available for remote applicants
cons: Website does not disclose APR, interest rates, or complete fee structure publicly
Operates through third-party lenders, creating intermediary relationships unclear to borrowers
Customer reviews appear curated and contain inconsistencies (one mentions competitor name)
Truncated footer prevents disclosure of critical underwriting and repayment terms
High-cost emergency lending product likely carries substantial APR despite 'low-interest' claims
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history needing same-day emergency cash
Detroit-area residents preferring in-person service and immediate approval
Borrowers needing loan amounts between $250-$1,000 for urgent expenses
Those unable to qualify for traditional bank loans or credit union products
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best suited for consumers in immediate financial distress with poor credit who cannot access traditional lending and need cash within hours. The primary caveat is that actual loan terms (APR, fees, repayment period) are not disclosed on their website, making it impossible to assess whether these are truly affordable emergency loans or standard high-cost payday products; borrowers must contact them directly to understand the actual cost of borrowing.
services: In-person loan processing at Detroit storefront
meta_description: US Cash Advance at 601 E Hillside Dr, Bloomington, IN. Fast payday and title loans with convenient weekend hours.
